string.name: job_description
string.value: Paste the full job description here if you are not using a URL.

string.name: style_guide
string.value: No fluff. Metrics over adjectives. Ownership over responsibility. Short, sharp sentences. Avoid generic excitement language.

string.name: recent_learnings
string.value: Prefer direct statements. Use proof and outcomes. Remove filler. Do not overstate.

string.name: resume_facts
string.value: Joseph T C. 18+ years across product, founder, operations, international execution, and AI automation. Built products end-to-end. Managed cross-functional teams. Strong in process automation using n8n and AI workflows.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$('Code - Parse Score JSON').first().json, generated_resume: $json.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || '' } }];

return [{
  json: {
    id: `${Date.now()}`,
    date: new Date().toISOString(),
    company: $json.company,
    role: $json.role,
    job_url: $json.job_url,
    input_mode: $json.input_mode,
    job_description: $json.job_description,
    base_profile_used: $json.base_profile_used,
    fit_score: $json.fit_score,
    strengths: $json.strengths,
    gaps: $json.gaps,
    decision: 'skip',
    reasoning: $json.reasoning,
    message: 'Skipped because fit score is below threshold.',
    ready_for_google_sheets: {
      company: $json.company,
      role: $json.role,
      job_url: $json.job_url,
      base_profile_used: $json.base_profile_used,
      fit_score: $json.fit_score,
      fit_gaps: JSON.stringify($json.gaps || []),
      decision: 'skip'
    }
  }
}];
